'''Tecave City''' {{Pronounced|tɛ'kɑve}} was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]. Notable for its ornamented, architecturally distinctive buildings, Tecave City shared its name with the [[Tecave]] plant. The one deviation from the semi-tall buildings that characterized the city was the structure that housed the [[Council of Elders (Cerea)|Council of Elders]]; a massive, metallic edifice seemingly overgrown with vegetation.<ref name="Star Wars: Prelude to Rebellion">''[[Star Wars: Prelude to Rebellion]]''</ref>

{{City-stub}}
